title: Easy Vaccine - Zombie Virus Antidote
description: Easy way to add vaccines to cure zombie virus from mod "Hordes"
body: ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fea069d8ae28ec12757df4d91193406cfe4e38dd.png) > Mod adds a better way of dealing with zombie infection from the mod "[The Hordes](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-hordes)". > With this mod, you actually have to craft a syringe and then make a vaccine. Make sure to follow the guide at the bottom to set it up corectly. # SYRINGE ![SYRINGE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a63f20ea729986369ec36b0b9a719944fdbbab2b.png) # VACCINE ![VACCINE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836bc9d71555aa8c881ffd76ef78cfa4b1028613.png) # GUIDE > To use this mod you first have to set up config for "Hordes" mod correctly. > Navigate to "infection_cures.json" file shown in the screenshot below > ![guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/069d0cfb610705b31190cfe85afdf199abafb130.png) > Code inside has to look like this: > ![code](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8dede1fb464f51f2223926b9634c6e1d53203b7.png) ``` { "replace": false, "values": [ "annoyvaccine:vaccine" ] } ```
